name: calculate_material_cost
description: Calculate material cost for construction. Use for pipe (pvc_c900_8, dip_8, rcp_18, etc.), concrete (3000_psi, 4000_psi), aggregate (crushed_rock_34, base_course), or rebar. Returns unit cost, total, and waste factor. Supports regional rates.

material_type.description: Material category: pipe, concrete, aggregate, asphalt, or rebar

quantity.description: Quantity in appropriate unit (LF, CY, ton)

size.description: Size/grade key. Pipe: '8' for 8-inch. Concrete: '4000_psi'. Rebar: '5_rebar'.

region.description: Geographic region for rate lookup. Available: national (default), utah, mountain_west, texas, california, northeast. Rates reflect local market conditions including prevailing wage where applicable.

name: calculate_labor_cost
description: Calculate labor cost by type, hours, and region. Labor types: operator, laborer, foreman, superintendent, pipe_layer, grade_checker, traffic_control, ironworker, electrician, plumber.

labor_type.description: Labor classification: operator, laborer, foreman, superintendent, pipe_layer, grade_checker, traffic_control, ironworker, electrician, plumber

region.description: Geographic region for rate lookup. Available: national (default), utah, mountain_west, texas, california, northeast. Rates reflect local market conditions including prevailing wage where applicable.

name: calculate_equipment_cost
description: Calculate equipment rental cost by type, days, and region. Types: excavator, excavator_20t, excavator_30t, excavator_mini, backhoe, dozer_d6, motor_grader, wheel_loader, dump_truck, water_truck, compactor, jumping_jack, plate_compactor, roller_sheepsfoot, dewatering_pump, generator, trench_box, auger.

equipment_type.description: Equipment type key (e.g. excavator_20t, dump_truck, jumping_jack)

region.description: Geographic region for rate lookup. Available: national (default), utah, mountain_west, texas, california, northeast. Rates reflect local market conditions including prevailing wage where applicable.

name: estimate_project_cost
description: Full project cost estimate with materials, labor, equipment, and markup.

region.description: Geographic region for rate lookup. Available: national (default), utah, mountain_west, texas, california, northeast. Rates reflect local market conditions including prevailing wage where applicable.

name: get_historical_unit_prices
description: Look up HeavyBid-derived historical unit prices for similar bid items. Use when the user asks what similar work carried on prior bids.

description.description: Description or keywords for the work item to match

unit.description: Optional unit filter such as LF, EA, LS, CY, or TN

limit.description: Maximum number of historical matches to return

name: lookup_heavybid_crew
description: Search the normalized HeavyBid crew library by crew code or description.

crew_code.description: Exact or partial HeavyBid crew code

limit.description: Maximum number of crew matches to return

name: estimate_from_bid_history
description: Estimate a line item using HeavyBid-derived historical unit prices and an optional markup.

description.description: Description or keywords for the work item to estimate

unit.description: Optional unit filter such as LF, EA, LS, CY, or TN

markup.description: Optional markup as decimal, e.g. 0.15 for 15%

limit.description: Maximum number of historical matches to use

name: load_rate_library
description: Load a named rate library into the estimating engine and return its contents. Use for private HeavyBid-derived rate tables or other external libraries.

region_key.description: Rate library key such as heavybid_derived or national

name: get_production_benchmark
description: Return HeavyBid-derived production benchmarks such as units per manhour for similar work items.

description.description: Description or keywords for the work item to benchmark

unit.description: Optional unit filter such as LF, EA, LS, CY, or TN

limit.description: Maximum number of historical benchmark rows to return

name: build_schedule
description: Build a construction schedule with phases and dates.

name: render_proposal_html
description: Generate proposal HTML for PDF export.

name: create_calendar_event
description: Normalize calendar event data for Apple/Google calendar add flow. Use when user asks to add an event to calendar or uses /addevent. For timed events, provide ISO datetimes in start/end.

start.description: Start datetime in ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-03-03T06:30:00-07:00), or date for all-day

end.description: End datetime in ISO 8601. Optional if duration_minutes is provided.

duration_minutes.description: Optional event duration in minutes when end is omitted

name: search_email
description: Search connected inbox accounts (Gmail/Outlook). Use for requests like find emails, search inbox, or check recent messages.

name: send_email
description: Send an email through a connected inbox account (Gmail/Outlook). Use after confirming recipients, subject, and body.

to.description: Recipient email or array of emails
